title: Emergency Mitigation Steps - CVE-2026-12345
content:
IMMEDIATE ACTIONS (Next 2 Hours)
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ

1. IDENTIFY AFFECTED SYSTEMS
   $ find / -name "struts*.jar" 2>/dev/null
   $ grep -r "struts-core-2" /opt /var
   Check versions: 2.5.0 - 2.6.4 are vulnerable

2. TEMPORARY WAF RULES (If patching delayed)
   Block Content-Type headers containing:
   вЂў %{ or ${
   вЂў #_= or @java
   вЂў Length > 100 characters
   вЂў Multiple semicolons

3. NETWORK SEGMENTATION
   вЂў Isolate affected apps from sensitive data
   вЂў Enable aggressive outbound filtering
   вЂў Monitor for reverse shell attempts

4. ENABLE VERBOSE LOGGING
   Set: struts.devMode=false
        struts.i18n.encoding=UTF-8
   Log all Content-Type headers >50 chars

5. PATCH DEPLOYMENT
   Test: QA environment first (2-4 hours)
   Deploy: Staged rollout to production
   Verify: No OGNL evaluation in logs

FALLBACK: Downgrade to Struts 2.3.37 (LTS)
